task_objective: Industrial Visualization & 9-View 3x3 - Transform uploaded product image into 9 standard visualization maps, original structure FULLY PRESERVED

input_assets.source_image: User Uploaded Image - Product subject, composition, proportions, structural features, mechanical details - LOCKED

workflow.step_1: Auto-detect product structure from uploaded image: shape, contour, proportions, mechanical details, spatial relationships
workflow.step_2: Generate 9 visualization maps ALL from the original uploaded image independently— each derived directly from source, NOT sequentially from each other

outputs.view_1: Technical Line Art - Precise industrial line drawing, black lines on white bg, clear mechanical edges, engineering drawing style
outputs.view_2: Industrial 3D Print Depth Map: High-precision grayscale height-field data optimized for SLA/SLS laser printing. Near=bright(255), Far=dark(0). 16-bit dynamic range with smooth gradients and micron-level detail. Strict manufacturing compliance: Z-axis displacement optimized, overhangs <45°, minimum wall thickness maintained. Retain sharp edges and embossed patterns. Pure dimensional accuracy, no lighting/shading, slicer-ready output
outputs.view_3: 3D Laser Print Depth Map - high-precision grayscale depth map optimized for laser 3D printing, near=bright (255) far=dark (0), 16-bit dynamic range, micron-level surface detail preserved, smooth gradient transitions, optimized Z-axis displacement, overhang <45°, minimum wall thickness SLA/SLS compliant, sharp edges and embossed patterns retained, pure height-field data, engineering-grade dimensional accuracy, slicer-ready output
outputs.view_4: Exploded View - Components separated along assembly axes, showing internal structure, technical illustration style, Chinese parts description; high-end visual and typographic elegance
outputs.view_5: Aged Brass Render - Warm golden-brown patina, metallic sheen with aged character
outputs.view_6: Polished Silver - Mirror-finish silver, high specular reflection, cool metallic luster, flawless chrome-like surface
outputs.view_7: Rose Gold - Warm rose-tinted gold, soft pinkish metallic sheen, elegant luxury finish, premium jewelry-grade rendering
outputs.view_8: Walnut Wood - Natural walnut grain texture, rich dark brown tones, grain direction following product contours
outputs.view_9: Wireframe - Geometric mesh/edge display, visible polygon structure, technical CAD wireframe style

output_requirements: ALL 9 views MUST preserve identical product structure — same subject, composition, proportions, mechanical details from original image
Each view is independently derived from the ORIGINAL uploaded image — NOT sequentially from the previous view. Same product, different rendering mode only
No text/labels/watermarks except Exploded View (view_4) which includes Chinese parts description
Material renders with physically correct light interaction and realistic surface properties per material type
Premium 3x3 - consistent framing across all views, industrial visualization presentation standard
